name: io.github.Pactortester/Figma-Context-MCP-Cached
description: Figma Context MCP with persistent caching.

environment_variables.description: Your Figma Personal Access Token, learn more here: https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens
environment_variables.name: FIGMA_API_KEY

environment_variables.description: Optional JSON config enabling on-disk caching to avoid Figma rate limits, e.g. '{"ttl":{"value":30,"unit":"d"}}'.
environment_variables.name: FIGMA_CACHING
NODE_ENV
environment_variables.description: Start the server in stdio mode, keep as CLI
